entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Triticum aestivum L., the crop affected by tan spot disease

entities.name: TAN SPOT
entities.description: A major foliar disease of wheat caused by Pyrenophora tritici-repentis

entities.name: PYRENOPHORA TRITICI-REPENTIS
entities.description: An ascomycete fungus that causes tan spot in wheat

entities.name: CULTURE FILTRATES
entities.description: A method of inducing disease symptoms used as a surrogate for spore inoculation

entities.name: CONIDIOSPORE INOCULA
entities.description: A method of inducing disease symptoms in wheat genotypes

entities.name: TAN SPOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of wheat genotypes to resist tan spot disease

entities.name: RACE 2
entities.description: A specific race of Pyrenophora tritici-repentis

entities.name: RACE 5
entities.description: A specific race of Pyrenophora tritici-repentis

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: F2:6 population developed from a cross between ND 735 and Steele-ND

entities.name: ND 735
entities.description: A resistant wheat genotype used in the cross

entities.name: STEELE-ND
entities.description: A susceptible wheat genotype used in the cross

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: Analysis used to determine the genetic control and location of resistance genes

entities.name: TSR1
entities.description: A single recessive gene located on chromosome 5BL controlling resistance to race 2

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 5BL
entities.description: The genomic location of the Tsr1 gene

entities.name: NECROSIS INSENSITIVITY
entities.description: Insensitivity to necrosis induced by race 2 of P. tritici-repentis

entities.name: TSR6
entities.description: A recessive gene located on chromosome 2BS conferring resistance to race 5

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 2BS
entities.description: The genomic location of the Tsr6 gene

entities.name: CHLOROSIS INSENSITIVITY
entities.description: Insensitivity to chlorosis induced by race 5 of P. tritici-repentis

entities.name: DIVERSITY ARRAYS TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A marker technology used to identify markers linked to resistance genes

entities.name: WPT-3049
entities.description: A marker closely linked to the Tsr1 gene

entities.name: WPT-0289
entities.description: A marker closely linked to the Tsr6 gene

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using markers to select for resistance genes
